title: Diminishing clinical impact for post-approval cancer clinical trials: A retrospective cohort study.
author: Ouimet C Bouche G Kimmelman J
content:
S-EPMC9467301 PMC9467301 Diminishing clinical impact for post-approval cancer clinical trials: A retrospective cohort study.

Background
